studyName: Natural History in Fabry Renal Disease

tables.description: Medical History: eye complications, kidney complications related to Fabry disease, cardiovascular complications, neurological, review of other systems (skin problems, GI, stomach, intestinal, or digestion), psychological issues or problems, and family history of parents and siblings.
